official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound hurt_animation packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official hurt_animation body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound hurt_animation frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns hurt_animation to packet id 0x2a.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the hurt_animation id to ClientboundHurtAnimationPacket.
The official hurt_animation body is entity id VarInt followed by yaw float.
The fixture uses primitive constructor values, so it does not require initialized LivingEntity, Level, registry contents, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove entity existence, hurt animation semantics, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, hurt animation semantics, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
